scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run validate && npm run inspect
scripts.render:draft: node node_modules/hyperframes/dist/cli.js render --quality draft --workers 1 --video-frame-format png --no-browser-gpu --output gridbash-product-launch-draft.mp4
scripts.render: node node_modules/hyperframes/dist/cli.js render --quality standard --workers 1 --video-frame-format png --no-browser-gpu --output gridbash-product-launch.mp4
